history.content: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
history.author: Steve Jobs

history.content: What is new in the world? Nothing. What is old in the world? Nothing. Everything has always been and will always be.
history.author: Sai Baba

history.content: Every time you smile at someone, it is an action of love, a gift to that person, a beautiful thing.
history.author: Mother Teresa

history.content: There is no way to happiness, happiness is the way.
history.author: Thích Nhất Hạnh

history.content: God made me fast. And when I run, I feel His pleasure.
history.author: Eric Liddell

history.content: The friend who can be silent with us in a moment of despair or confusion, who can stay with us in an hour of grief and bereavement, who can tolerate not knowing... not healing, not curing... that is a friend who cares.
history.author: Henri Nouwen

history.content: It takes courage to grow up and become who you really are.
history.author: E. E. Cummings

history.content: A passion for politics stems usually from an insatiable need, either for power, or for friendship and adulation, or a combination of both.
history.author: Fawn M. Brodie

history.content: As an elephant in the battlefield withstands arrows shot from bows all around, even so shall I endure abuse.
history.author: The Buddha

history.content: Meetings are indispensable when you don't want to do anything.
history.author: John Kenneth Galbraith

history.content: Great acts are made up of small deeds.
history.author: Laozi

history.content: Tell me and I forget. Teach me and I remember. Involve me and I learn.
history.author: Benjamin Franklin

history.content: Let us resolve to be masters, not the victims, of our history, controlling our own destiny without giving way to blind suspicions and emotions.
history.author: John F. Kennedy

history.content: If you can dream it, you can do it.
history.author: Walt Disney

history.content: Tennis is a perfect combination of violent action taking place in an atmosphere of total tranquillity.
history.author: Billie Jean King

quotes.content: Stay positive and happy. Work hard and don't give up hope.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.content: Every day may not be good, but there is something good in every day.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.content: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs
